title: sterculia stipulata var. jagori
intro: Sterculia stipulata var. jagori, also known as the jagori sterculia, is a plant species belonging to the sterculia family, native to India and Southeast Asia. The jagori sterculia is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include relief from fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In traditional medicine, the jagori sterculia is prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to harness its therapeutic properties.
